summary: Iteration 30: Complete testing of Smart Reservation Alerts system. All backend APIs (10/10 tests) and frontend UI (12/12 tests) passed. Features working: KPI cards, Alertes Smart tab with badge, Notifications tab with badge, Scanner button, Rules panel with 5 toggle rules, alert cards with type/severity badges, resolve alert button, stats chips.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reservations/alerts/rules - returns 5 default rules with correct structure
Backend: PUT /api/reservations/alerts/rules/{id} - toggle rule off/on works
Backend: POST /api/reservations/alerts/scan - scans reservations and generates alerts
Backend: GET /api/reservations/alerts/stats - returns by_type and by_severity breakdowns
Backend: GET /api/reservations/kpis - returns dashboard KPIs (total, active, confirmed, overdue)
Frontend: Navigate to /reservation/dashboard - dashboard loads with KPI cards
Frontend: KPI cards show correct values (27 total, 4 in progress, 5 confirmed, 3 overdue, 8 completed)
Frontend: Alertes Smart tab is active with badge count (6 alerts)
Frontend: Notifications tab shows badge count (14)
Frontend: Scanner button triggers scan and shows alerts
Frontend: Alert cards show title, message, type badge (En retard/Pas de check-out), severity badge (CRITICAL/WARNING)
Frontend: Règles button opens rules panel with 5 toggle rules
Frontend: Rule toggle changes state (checked to unchecked)
Frontend: Resolve button (checkmark) removes alert from list (6 -> 5)
Frontend: Notifications tab loads notification list (15 items)
Frontend: Stats chips appear (Pas de check-out: 3, En retard: 3)
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumReservationDashboard.jsx: Clean implementation with proper state management for alerts, rules, and tabs
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Backend endpoints properly handle alert rules CRUD, scan engine, and resolution
Alert scan correctly detects overdue (in_progress past end_date) and no_checkout (confirmed past start_date without checkout_at)
Stats endpoint returns proper by_type and by_severity breakdowns
WebSocket integration for real-time updates is implemented
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded reservations and alerts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 tested Smart Reservation Alerts system. Backend endpoints: GET /api/reservations/alerts/rules (5 default rules), POST /api/reservations/alerts/scan (scans and generates alerts), GET /api/reservations/alerts?status=active, PUT /api/reservations/alerts/{id}/resolve, GET /api/reservations/alerts/stats. Frontend: /reservation/dashboard with tabs (Alertes Smart, Notifications), Scanner button, Règles button for rules panel, resolve button on each alert. All data-testid attributes: reservation-dashboard, kpi-grid, kpi-{i}, tab-alerts, tab-notifications, scan-alerts-btn, rules-toggle-btn, alert-rules-panel, rule-{i}, rule-toggle-{i}, smart-alert-{i}, resolve-alert-{i}, alert-stats, notif-{i}.

kpi_cards.details: 6 KPI cards showing total (27), in progress (4), confirmed (5), today (0), overdue (3), completed (8)

alertes_smart_tab.details: Active tab with badge showing alert count (6), displays alert cards with title, message, type badge, severity badge

notifications_tab.details: Tab with badge showing unread count (14), displays notification list

rules_panel.details: Opens with 5 toggle rules (overdue, upcoming, no_checkout, long_usage, low_battery_reserved)

rule_toggle.details: Toggle changes rule enabled state via PUT /api/reservations/alerts/rules/{id}

resolve_alert.details: Checkmark button resolves alert via PUT /api/reservations/alerts/{id}/resolve, removes from list

stats_chips.details: Shows breakdown by type (Pas de check-out: 3, En retard: 3)
